title: Senior IT Operations Engineer
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Join our experienced operations team in Aix-en-Provence. You ensure the reliability of production systems and are the technical reference for complex incidents and infrastructure improvements.
mission.1: Superviser et exploiter les systèmes en production
mission.3: Automatiser les opérations avec Ansible et scripts
mission.4: Gérer les déploiements et les mises en production
mission.5: Maintenir à jour les procédures d'exploitation
mission.6: Participer aux projets d'évolution de l'infrastructure
profile.2: 4 à 8 years of experience in production IT
